calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Richard James McLeod.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:26 a.m.

Derrick Uhri, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
Evin Culp, Vendor Analyst and Custodian of Records for Discover Bank, was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Uhri and Culp appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Richard James McLeod.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts - Open Book & Account Stated - was filed on January 29, 2021, and personally served on defendant Richard James McLeod on June 19, 2021.
Default as to defendant Richard James McLeod was entered on November 8, 2021.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff Discover Bank submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Cardholder Agreement.......................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Account Statements.........................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Discover Bank, and against the defaulted defendant Richard James McLeod, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,754.93.
Costs - $515.00.

Total - $32,269.93.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:32 a.m.
